questions.q: From the following, which method of valuation of closing stock is acceptable?
questions.explanation: Cost method is acceptable because it is based on actual cost of goods sold.
questions.topic: Methods of valuation of closing stock

questions.q: Which of the following is a limitation of the Test Check method?
opts: (D) It provides an approximate idea of the accounts
questions.explanation: Test Check method is not reliable because it is an approximate method.

questions.q: The following is the reason for taking a Test Check?
opts: (A) To verify the accuracy of the accounts
(B) To reduce the amount of work
(C) To increase the amount of work
(D) To increase the time of preparation
questions.explanation: Test Check is taken to reduce the amount of work.

questions.q: An auditor is appointed to check the accounts of a company. He finds that the company is using the Test Check method. What is his first step?
opts: (C) To discuss the method with the accountant
questions.explanation: The auditor should discuss the method with the accountant to understand the procedure.

opts: (A) To verify the accuracy of the accounts

(C) To reduce the amount of work
(D) To increase the time of preparation
questions.explanation: Test Check is taken to reduce the amount of work.

questions.explanation: Weighted average method is based on the average cost of goods available for sale.
